case_title: TROPHY PROPERTIES XII, LLC VS. CONNIE CASSADY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TROPHY PROPERTIES XII, LLC
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-16-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-16-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TROPHY PROPERTIES XII, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASSADY, CONNIE $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-16-2008 - JUDGMENT.
DEFENDANT'S CORRESPONDENCE RETURNED. IT IS AN EX PARTE COMMUNICATION TO THE COURT AND CANNOT BE FILED WITH THE COURT OR REVIEWED BY A JUDICIAL OFFICER.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,595.00 FILED BY TROPHY PROPERTIES XII, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CASSADY, CONNIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-16-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT CASSADY, CONNIE ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-15-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CASSADY, CONNIE
DECLARATION FROM THE DEFT RE HER NEW ADDRESS.
